entries.text:
Verse 2

damnation

Condemnation, i.e. in the sense of judgment by the magistrate.

Verse 8

Owe

See Leviticus 19:13; Proverbs 22:7.

Verse 11

nearer

"Nearer" in the sense of the full result of salvation in glory. (See Scofield "Romans 1:16"). Also, 1 John 3:2.
